Adds:
- Beginner Law
- Full map reveal in reincarnator setting
- Magic Array to craft Qi Gather Swords, special mood pill and Spirit Cloth
- The Magic Array also contains special functions
- Temperature regulating incense burner
- Terraforming
- Map location to gather resources

*Added option at Magic Circle to spawn Coloful Mountain for people who activate the mod midgame*
